# attestto-app

> Sovereign citizen wallet — identity, credentials, documents, payments, and country-specific modules. Mobile-first PWA.

Part of the [Attestto Open](https://attestto.org) ecosystem.

## What it is

A Progressive Web App (PWA) that puts identity, verifiable credentials, document signing, and DID-authenticated payments in a citizen's pocket. Installable from the browser, works offline, dark-theme only.

Desktop users are redirected to a demo/marketing page. The app is designed for mobile.

## Monorepo structure

```
attestto-app/
  app/                    — Core PWA shell (Vue 3 + Quasar + Vite + PWA)
  modules/
    sdk/                  — @attestto/module-sdk — module interface contract
    cr-driving/           — app-module-cr-driving — CR driving exam module
    cr-medical/           — app-module-cr-medical — CR medical attestation module
```

## Stack

- Vue 3 + TypeScript
- Quasar Framework (components, dark theme)
- Vite + vite-plugin-pwa
- Pinia (state management)
- Vue Router (with dynamic module route registration)
- `@noble/curves` — Ed25519 signing
- WebAuthn / WebCrypto API — vault unlock and key operations

## Core screens

| Route | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/lock` | Vault unlock via passkey / biometric |
| `/home` | Inbox — module items, pending credentials, notifications |
| `/wallet` | DID-authenticated payments and balances |
| `/documents` | Signed documents, pending signatures |
| `/credentials` | Verifiable Credentials vault |
| `/settings` | Language, security, backup |

Auth guard: all routes with `meta: { requiresAuth: true }` require vault unlock first.

## Crypto

| What | How | Where |
|---|---|---|
| Vault unlock | WebAuthn passkey | `composables/useCrypto.ts` |
| Identity signing | Ed25519 via `@noble/curves`, key in IndexedDB | `composables/useCrypto.ts` |
| Vault encryption | AES-256-GCM | `composables/useEncryptedVault.ts` |
| Exam session integrity | SHA-256 hash chain | Web Crypto API |
| Solana anchoring | HTTP to attestto-anchor | `composables/useAnchor.ts` |

## Module system

Modules implement `AttesttoModule` from `@attestto/module-sdk`. Any module:
- Declares which Verifiable Credentials it requires (credential-gated install)
- Registers its routes dynamically via Vue Router
- Pushes inbox items to the home screen
- Gets scoped storage (localStorage namespaced by module ID)
- Has no access to other modules' data or keys

### Built-in modules

`cr-driving` — Costa Rica driving ecosystem: theory exam booking, practical exam results, license credential, RTV status, marchamo.

`cr-medical` — Costa Rica medical attestation: appointment booking, medical fitness credential issuance.

### Building a module

```typescript
import type { AttesttoModule } from '@attestto/module-sdk'

const myModule: AttesttoModule = {
  id: 'my-module',
  name: 'My Module',
  requiredCredentials: ['DrivingLicense'],    // vault must contain these
  routes: [
    { path: '/my-module', component: MyModuleHome },
  ],
  inboxItems: (store) => store.getPendingItems(),
}

export default myModule
```

## Design tokens

Dark theme only. Tokens in `app/src/styles/tokens.css`:

| Token | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg-base` | `#0f1923` | Background |
| `--bg-card` | `#1a1f2e` | Cards |
| `--primary` | `#594FD3` | Action buttons |
| `--success` | `#4ade80` | Valid / verified |
| `--critical` | `#ef4444` | Invalid / failed |

## i18n

`vue-i18n` with `es` (Spanish, default) and `en` (English). Language persisted to localStorage. Toggle in Settings.

## Development

```bash
pnpm dev        # start dev server (app/)
pnpm build      # build PWA (app/)
pnpm test       # vitest (30 tests)
pnpm typecheck  # typecheck all packages
```

## CI

GitHub Actions: install → typecheck → test → build on push/PR to main.

## Source layout

```
app/src/
  main.ts
  App.vue
  router/        — route definitions + auth guard
  stores/        — Pinia stores (vault, credentials, wallet, documents)
  views/         — page components
  components/    — shared UI components
  composables/   — useCrypto, useEncryptedVault, useAnchor, ...
  modules/       — dynamic module loader
  i18n/          — es.json, en.json
  styles/        — tokens.css, global.css
modules/
  sdk/src/       — AttesttoModule interface + types
  cr-driving/    — driving exam module
  cr-medical/    — medical module
```

## Related repos

| Repo | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `attestto-desktop` | Electron "Station" for heavy signing and mesh node operations |
| `attestto-mobile` | Camera companion PWA for document/selfie capture |
| `attestto-mesh` | P2P data layer — credentials sync and recovery via mesh |
| `@attestto-com/vc-sdk` | Verifiable Credential issuance and verification |
| `cr-vc-schemas` | CR credential type definitions used by the cr-driving module |
